citations.claim: The pack overview identifies the Land-Ocean Global Means table.
The historical row unit supplies the schema and years through 1978.
The recent row unit supplies 1979–2026 values and missing markers.
The paper states all 15 FAIR sub-principles used by the audit.

raw_event_normalization: Local checkout prefix replaced with '.'; all other JSON-RPC data preserved.

derived.missing_value_policy: Exclude only rows whose J-D value is '***' from annual comparisons.

fair_audit.definition: (meta)data are assigned a globally unique and persistent identifier
fair_audit.rationale: A source URL and local unit IDs exist, but global persistence is not established.

rationale_segments.text: A source URL and local unit IDs exist, but global persistence is not established.

fair_audit.definition: data are described with rich metadata (defined by R1 below)
fair_audit.rationale: The rows preserve a schema and values; descriptive metadata remains sparse.

rationale_segments.text: The rows preserve a schema and values; descriptive metadata remains sparse.

fair_audit.definition: metadata clearly and explicitly include the identifier of the data it describes
fair_audit.rationale: Read units carry source locators, but no explicit persistent dataset identifier is shown.

rationale_segments.text: Read units carry source locators, but no explicit persistent dataset identifier is shown.

fair_audit.definition: (meta)data are registered or indexed in a searchable resource
fair_audit.rationale: A recorded search_resource step searched the local MCP pack; registration in an external searchable registry is not evidenced.

rationale_segments.text: A recorded search_resource step searched the local MCP pack
registration in an external searchable registry is not evidenced.

fair_audit.definition: (meta)data are retrievable by their identifier using a standardized communications protocol
fair_audit.rationale: A recorded read_unit step retrieved a captured unit through MCP; no globally persistent identifier is evidenced.

rationale_segments.text: A recorded read_unit step retrieved a captured unit through MCP
no globally persistent identifier is evidenced.

fair_audit.definition: the protocol is open, free, and universally implementable
fair_audit.rationale: A recorded local stdio MCP exchange works with network_access=false; the captured pack units do not establish that the protocol is universally implementable.

rationale_segments.text: A recorded local stdio MCP exchange works with network_access=false
the captured pack units do not establish that the protocol is universally implementable.

fair_audit.definition: the protocol allows for an authentication and authorization procedure, where necessary
fair_audit.rationale: No authentication or authorization procedure appears in the captured dataset units.

rationale_segments.text: No authentication or authorization procedure appears in the captured dataset units.

fair_audit.definition: metadata are accessible, even when the data are no longer available
fair_audit.rationale: The snapshot cannot prove metadata survival after source data disappearance.

rationale_segments.text: The snapshot cannot prove metadata survival after source data disappearance.

fair_audit.definition: (meta)data use a formal, accessible, shared, and broadly applicable language for knowledge representation.
fair_audit.rationale: A machine-readable table schema is preserved, but no formal knowledge-representation language is declared.

rationale_segments.text: A machine-readable table schema is preserved, but no formal knowledge-representation language is declared.

fair_audit.definition: (meta)data use vocabularies that follow FAIR principles
fair_audit.rationale: No FAIR vocabulary is declared in the captured dataset units.

rationale_segments.text: No FAIR vocabulary is declared in the captured dataset units.

fair_audit.rationale: No qualified references to other metadata objects are captured.

rationale_segments.text: No qualified references to other metadata objects are captured.

fair_audit.definition: meta(data) are richly described with a plurality of accurate and relevant attributes
fair_audit.rationale: Column names and values are present, while richer contextual attributes are limited.

rationale_segments.text: Column names and values are present, while richer contextual attributes are limited.

fair_audit.definition: (meta)data are released with a clear and accessible data usage license
fair_audit.rationale: No data-usage license appears in the complete three-unit GISTEMP pack.

rationale_segments.text: No data-usage license appears in the complete three-unit GISTEMP pack.

fair_audit.rationale: Source locators and content SHA-256 values provide capture-level provenance.

rationale_segments.text: Source locators and content SHA-256 values provide capture-level provenance.

fair_audit.rationale: No domain-community metadata standard is declared in the captured units.

rationale_segments.text: No domain-community metadata standard is declared in the captured units.

run_evidence.claim: The local MCP search returned the expected GISTEMP overview unit.
The MCP read returned the captured overview unit and its content hash.
The local stdio MCP session initialized successfully; run metadata records data_access='real stdio MCP subprocess only' and network_access=false.
